description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped handcart constructed primarily from metal, featuring a weathered, matte finish. The cart has four large, spoked wheels attached to its sides, providing stability and ease of movement. The body of the cart is box-like, with high, solid side panels and a flat base, suitable for carrying various loads. At one end, there is a protruding metal bar that serves as a handle for pushing or pulling the cart. The opposite end has reinforced metal strips, likely for structural support. The overall design is utilitarian, evoking a vintage or industrial aesthetic suitable for urban environments such as parks, markets, or construction sites.
description: A weathered metal handcart with four large spoked wheels, high side panels, and a protruding handlebar. Its boxy, open-topped design is ideal for transporting goods in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid metal face, high side panels, and the central handlebar extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both large spoked wheels and the full length of the open cargo area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the reinforced metal strips and the open end of the cart.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible angled support bars and both wheels, mirroring the other side.
